profile_bio: Dr. Muhammad Khurram Ehsan is a HOD CS / Sr. Associate Professor in the Department of Computer Science at Bahria University, Islamabad (E-8). Research focuses on Digital Twin (Wireless/RF); AI-Enabled Next-Gen Networks; SDN; Signal Processing. Active in teaching, supervision and collaborative research within the School of Engineering and Applied Sciences.
